note: Maps the placeholder rule id `example.dr.replica-lag-threshold` to the shipped high-severity `postgresql-server.high-availability` (a degraded replica with no zone-redundant HA is the DR-reliability gap the scenario models). Props fire ONLY high-availability: ha_mode=Disabled trips it, while encryption_at_rest_enabled=true, ssl_enforcement=enabled, backup_retention_days=35 (>= min 7), cpu_p95_percent=80 (>= 20), and a non-empty diagnostic_settings satisfy the co-resident postgresql rules. wire_risk_gate=true routes the remediate.enable-zone-redundancy action (t0 ceiling enforce_hil) to HIL, so no shadow PR is published - matching the frozen guard.should_execute=false and decision=hil.
